## 2026-02-24 - Static HTML Report Accessibility
**Learning:** The generated HTML report (`listing_report.html`) lacked basic keyboard accessibility features like focus indicators and skip links, making it difficult for keyboard-only users to navigate the large grid of listings.
**Action:** Added global `:focus-visible` styles and a `.skip-link` with inline CSS to `generate_report.py`. Ensure future generated reports include these styles by default.

## 2026-03-31 - Redundant Image Alt Text Next to Headings
**Learning:** In the listing cards generated by `generate_report.py`, setting `alt="{item.get('name')}"` on the avatar image immediately preceding an `<h2>{item.get('name')}</h2>` heading caused screen readers to announce the exact same text twice, frustrating keyboard-only and visually impaired users.
**Action:** Used `alt="" aria-hidden="true"` for decorative/redundant images next to identical headings to prevent double announcements, improving the screen reader experience.
